name: deep-research-50
commands: ROCKY_LLM_SMOKE=1 ROCKY_BIN=./.venv/bin/rocky pytest tests/agent/test_deep_research_50_live.py -k deep_research_50 -v -m slow
summary: Long-horizon research scenario: a survey prompt across 10 frameworks must produce >=50 successful web tool_results in a single subprocess (timeout_s=900). Bit-flip negative on a from-training prompt caps web tool_results at 10. Marked slow. Note: 'deep' here refers to long-horizon research style, not Lane.DEEP enum (research/site signatures route Lane.STANDARD by design).
